title: COVID-19 Veterans Assistance Act of 2021
fullText:
COVID-19 Veterans Assistance Act of 2021 (Public Law 117-76).
An Act to extend certain temporary authorities, and for other purposes.

SEC. 5. EXTENSION OF TIME LIMITATIONS FOR USE OF ENTITLEMENT: VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION AND TRAINING.
Extended the temporary emergency education flexibilities originally authorized under the Student Veteran Coronavirus Response Act of 2020 (Pub. L. 116-140) to support veterans during the COVID-19 pandemic.
plainEnglish: Extended emergency protections for veteran students during the COVID-19 pandemic, including keeping full housing allowance rates for programs converted to online training.
veteranUse: Useful historical reference for program disruptions between 2020 and 2022.
